inputs.label: Incident Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle between the incident ray and the surface normal, measured in degrees. This is the primary variable determining the reflectivity via Fresnel equations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between the incident ray and the surface normal, measured in degrees. This is the primary variable determining the reflectivity via Fresnel equations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelen ışın ile yüzey normali arasındaki açı, derece cinsinden. Fresnel denklemleri ile yansıtıcılığı belirleyen ana değişkendir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel zwischen einfallendem Strahl und Flächennormale in Grad. Dies ist die primäre Variable, die die Reflektivität über die Fresnel-Gleichungen bestimmt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle entre le rayon incident et la normale à la surface, mesuré en degrés. C'est la variable principale déterminant la réflectivité via les équations de Fresnel.

inputs.label: Refractive Index (n₁)
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the incident medium (e.g., air = 1.0). Governs the speed of light and the angle of refraction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index of the incident medium (e.g., air = 1.0). Governs the speed of light and the angle of refraction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelen ortamın kırılma indisi (örneğin hava = 1.0). Işığın hızını ve kırılma açısını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Brechungsindex des einfallenden Mediums (z. B. Luft = 1,0). Bestimmt die Lichtgeschwindigkeit und den Brechungswinkel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de réfraction du milieu incident (ex. air = 1,0). Régit la vitesse de la lumière et l'angle de réfraction.

inputs.label: Refractive Index (n₂)
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the transmitting medium (e.g., glass ≈ 1.5). Influences the reflectivity and critical angle for total internal reflection.

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index of the transmitting medium (e.g., glass ≈ 1.5). Influences the reflectivity and critical angle for total internal reflection.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İletim ortamının kırılma indisi (örneğin cam ≈ 1.5). Yansıtıcılığı ve toplam iç yansıma için kritik açıyı etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Brechungsindex des durchlässigen Mediums (z. B. Glas ≈ 1,5). Beeinflusst das Reflexionsvermögen und den Grenzwinkel der Totalreflexion.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de réfraction du milieu transmetteur (ex. verre ≈ 1,5). Influence la réflectivité et l'angle critique pour la réflexion totale interne.

inputs.label: Wavelength
inputs.businessContext: Wavelength of light in vacuum (nominal). For documentation and dispersion reference only; not used in this calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Wavelength of light in vacuum (nominal). For documentation and dispersion reference only; not used in this calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Işığın vakumdaki dalga boyu (nominal). Yalnızca dokümantasyon ve dispersiyon referansı içindir; bu hesaplamada kullanılmaz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wellenlänge des Lichts im Vakuum (nominal). Nur für Dokumentation und Dispersionsreferenz; wird in dieser Berechnung nicht verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'onde de la lumière dans le vide (nominale). Pour documentation et référence de dispersion uniquement ; non utilisée dans ce calcul.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
